### bmm350\_init<!-- {{#callable_declaration:bmm350_init}} -->
[View Source →](<../../../../../../../src/fw/drivers/imu/bmm350/bmm350.h#L3>)

Initializes the BMM350 sensor.
- **Description**: Use this function to initialize the BMM350 sensor before any operations. It sets up necessary hardware configurations and ensures the sensor is ready for use. Call this function once before accessing the sensor to avoid redundant initializations. If the sensor is already initialized, the function returns immediately without performing any actions. This function also configures the interrupt pin and checks the sensor's reset status, logging a warning if the check fails.
- **Inputs**: None
- **Output**: None
- **See Also**: [`bmm350_init`](<bmm350.c.md#bmm350_init>)  (Implementation)
